notes: HDMI 2.0 grade confirmed via AVGear retailer listing. SDI outputs are BNC and auto-match up to 6G-SDI. The two 1/4" TRS jacks carry both balanced analog audio (2ch) and AES/EBU digital audio (4ch total). USB 2.0 port for config/firmware — official specs do not state exact USB connector form factor; Mini-USB is typical for this Blackmagic Mini Converter family generation but this is inferred and should be verified against the physical unit. Power connector is a locking DC barrel (12V, Blackmagic proprietary locking style); exact barrel dimensions not stated in official specs. Model SKU: CONVMBHS24K6G.

ports.name: SDI Out 1
ports.note: Auto-matches SD, HD, and 6G-SDI from HDMI input; supports up to 2160p30

ports.name: SDI Out 2
ports.note: Auto-matches SD, HD, and 6G-SDI from HDMI input; supports up to 2160p30

ports.name: Analog/AES In 1
ports.note: Balanced analog audio or AES/EBU digital audio (same 1/4" jack carries both); 2ch analog or 4ch AES/EBU total across both jacks

ports.name: Analog/AES In 2
ports.note: Balanced analog audio or AES/EBU digital audio (same 1/4" jack carries both)

ports.name: USB
ports.note: Used for firmware updates and configuration via Blackmagic Converters software; exact connector type (Mini-USB vs Micro-USB) not explicitly stated in official specs — inferred as Mini-USB based on this product family era (2017), but could be Micro-USB

ports.name: Power
ports.note: 12–18V DC; included 12V universal power supply with international socket adapters; uses Blackmagic locking DC barrel connector
